heading: Dufashe gukosora amakosa vuba
description: Raporo yawe ishyiraho ikibazo cya GitHub kugira ngo abagenzuzi babishakire.
safetyWarning: Gumisha iyi raporo itekanye. Ntukubiyemo amakuru bwite, aderesi ya imeri, nomero za telefoni, aderesi z'urugo/akazi, cyangwa ibanga ry'akanyamakuru.
screenshotsPlaceholder: Omeka amahuza y'amashusho, amashusho agenda, cyangwa dosiye z'igicu
errorApi404: API ya raporo y'ikosa ntiboneka muri iyi ntera. Niba uri kugerageza ku gikoresho cyawe, koresha urubuga rushyizweho mu kwohereza.
errorApi403: Iyi nkomoko ntiremerewe kohereza raporo y'ikosa. Nyamuneka suzuma APP_ORIGINS mu iterambere ry'inyuma.
errorApi500: Serivisi ya raporo y'ikosa ntirashyirwaho. Nyamuneka emeza ibintu by'ibidukikije bya GitHub token na repo.
errorApi502: Ishyirwaho ry'ikibazo cya GitHub byanze. Nyamuneka gerageza nanone mu minota.
errorApiGeneric: Ntitwashoboye kohereza raporo yawe y'ikosa ubu (HTTP {{status}}).
errorNetwork: Ikosa ry'umuyoboro mu gihe cyo kohereza raporo y'ikosa. Nyamuneka suzuma umuyoboro wawe ugerageze nanone.
successMessage: Ikibazo #{{number}} cyashyizweho neza kandi giteguye gushakishwa n'abagenzuzi.
